name: Chuck Norris
title: Chuck Norris last instagram post.
description: Photo still from last instagram post on March 10, 2026 to celebrate his 86th birthday. He died nine days later after experiencing a medical emergency.
bio: Chuck Norris is an American martial artist and actor who became a cultural icon through his action films and the television series "Walker, Texas Ranger". He holds black belts in multiple martial arts disciplines.
